payload.last_assistant_message:
PR created: **https://github.com/adobe-ai-pod/mas/pull/15**

Changes made:
- `plans.js`: Removed `${this.secureLabelFooter}` from `renderLayout()`, deleted 3 CSS rules targeting `footer` (the `footer` block, `footer ::slotted([slot='addon'])`, and `.wide-footer #stock-checkbox`)
- `plans.css.js`: Deleted 2 dead CSS rules targeting `[slot="footer"]` within plans variants
